properties.Test Case: Other books: ensure you can add all different pages.
properties.Steps: Other books: ensure you can add all different pages.

properties.Test Case: Wall Calendar: Add landscape images. Publish to PDF. Ensure grid lines are all visible. Ensure Add/Duplicate/Delete Page buttons are disabled. N.B. Wall Calendars are not expected to work in ePUB or BloomPUB, only PDF. We also don't expect them to be published to Bloom Library.
